agents.name: Dashboard Agent
agents.description: Builds the command center metrics snapshot from every store and writes it for the web dashboard.

agents.name: GitHub SEO Agent
agents.description: Proposes public repositories for the vynix-in organization and generates READMEs, docs, examples and release notes. Never publishes automatically.

agents.name: Changelog SEO Agent
agents.description: Turns releases and notable commits into blog drafts, release notes and social drafts.

agents.name: Directory Discovery Agent
agents.description: Maintains the master list of directories where Vynix can be listed for backlinks and discovery.

agents.name: Submission Preparation Agent
agents.description: Builds copy-paste ready submission packets for every discovered directory.

agents.name: Open Source Funnel Agent
agents.description: Reviews the codebase and proposes safe components to open source, with proprietary parts excluded.

agents.name: Comparison Page Agent
agents.description: Generates and updates competitor comparison pages from a shared template.

agents.name: Knowledge Base Agent
agents.description: Turns issues, fixes and releases into sanitized knowledge base articles, FAQs and troubleshooting guides.

agents.name: Internal Linking Agent
agents.description: Audits all generated content and suggests internal links, topic clusters and hub pages.
